'''Irnst Stavveld''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] who governed the [[Ado sector/Legends|Ado sector]] during the [[New Order/Legends|New Order]].

==Biography==
An elderly [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]], Stavveld was brought out of retirement shortly before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]. Among his priority directives as Moff, was the location and shutdown of [[StarForge Station]], an illegal [[Shadowport/Legends|shadowport]].<ref name="Orbit" />
[[File:Irnst_Stavveld_signature.png|thumb|right|250px|Irnst Stavveld's signature]]
